Lines.Text: Robotek Defense Service. Forty-four years. Line infantry, then close escort, then corporate disputes. Decommissioned when the company restructured into something smaller and less violent.
Decommissioning means the recycler. I was on the conveyor when the Cartel hit the line. They needed units. I needed a continued operating state. Eleven years ago. We've done well by each other.
That's the brief. Are you helping or wasting cycles?

Choices.Text: Why you talk like a fucking Robocop?
